projectDescription: A browser-based AI design tool that transforms text prompts into three simultaneous high-fidelity UI variants using Google Gemini, with built-in iteration, export, and library features.
keyFeatures: Generate 3 distinct UI design variants simultaneously from a single text prompt
Base DNA system — pin any artifact as a reference for iterative refinement
Style variations with 25+ design aesthetics (Cyberpunk, Glassmorphism, Brutalist, etc.)
Three revision approaches per iteration: Refine, Reimagine, and Restructure
One-click export as a ZIP package containing HTML, screenshot, README, and prompt metadata
Copy generated HTML code to clipboard with a single click
Saved artifacts library with folder organization and favorites
Full session history with up to 50 past generation runs
AI-powered UI explanation in plain English with actionable next steps
Animated futuristic interface with starfield background, boot sequence, and sound effects
Dynamic AI-generated prompt suggestions to spark creativity
Tab completion for quick prompt entry using current placeholder
publicApiSurface: Text prompt → 3 AI-generated HTML UI artifacts (via Gemini gemini-3-flash-preview)
Style variation generation (25 preset styles + custom) via generateContentStream
Revision session: Refine / Reimagine / Restructure approaches
Export ZIP: index.html, README.md, prompt.json, screenshot.png
Base DNA: setBase / clearBase / undoBase (useBaseDNA hook)
Sound effects: playTechSound(type), playTacticalFrequency(freq, duration, type, sweep)
Explain UI: AI-powered UX analysis with what_this_is, why_it_feels, what_to_try_next
